holdings.infoBox: PBE is an equity ETF with a total of 33 individual holdings. The top holdings are Amgen stock at 5.17%, Biogen at 5.06%, Vertex Pharmaceuticals at 4.99%, Royalty Pharma at 4.98%, and Regeneron Pharmaceuticals at 4.71%.

overview.description: The Invesco Biotechnology & Genome ETF (PBE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a tiered equal-weighted index of companies principally engaged in biotechnology and genetic engineering. PBE was launched on Jun 23, 2005 and is issued by Invesco.

data.text: Biotechnology is a dynamic but often volatile industry. These biotech ETFs provide a lower-risk way to invest in the space.

data.text: Most of the financial markets have trended lower in recent weeks, but biotech seems to have countered the trend.
